messages.content: translat A股市场成交保持活跃，主要股指收涨
The A-share market remains active with major stock indices closing higher.
translate A股股本融资维持常态化发行，整体融资规模合计5,171亿元
A-share stock financing maintains a normal regular issuance, with a total financing scale of 517.1 billion yuan.
translate A股IPO年初至今合计发行2,188亿元，为2022年同期的42%，A股IPO市场维持常态化发行
A-share IPOs have totaled 218.8 billion yuan since the beginning of the year, which is 42% of the same period in 2022. The A-share IPO market maintains a normal regular issuance.
translate 1.2 A股股本融资维持常态化发行
1.2 A-share stock financing maintains a normal regular issuance.
rephrase 517.1 Billion Yuan.
The total amount sums up to 517.1 billion yuan.
repharase usnig rmb, 517.1 Billion Yuan.
The cumulative amount reaches 517.1 billion yuan in RMB.
short for billion
The cumulative amount reaches 517.1 billion RMB.
short term for billion
The cumulative amount reaches 517.1 bn RMB.
short phrase for billion
The cumulative amount reaches 517.1bn RMB.
10million
10 million
short term for million
